arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich youth star Grant-Leon Ranos moves to 1. FC Kaiserslautern on loan
arts.sum: Having bagged an remarkable 20 goals and 13 assists in the Regionalliga, the fourth division of German football, in an explosive final campaign at the Bavarians, Ranos chose to join Borussia Mönchengladbach on a free transfer in 2023 rather than stay in Munich. Grant-Leon Ranos has joined 1.

arts.ttl: Mala Grohs returns as Bayern Munich Frauen trounce Young Boys 7-0 in friendly
arts.sum: It was only a friendly but the FC Bayern Frauen enjoyed a productive showcase match against Young Boys in a 7-0 win. Shortly after, Pernille Harder pounced on a loose back-pass in the opponent’s own box to snatch a second for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make contact over summer move for another Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: Contacts have been initiated between the brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid, and the entourage of Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich. That’s according to German football insider Christian Falk,…

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies injury: how serious is it and how long will he be out for?
arts.sum: As if Wednesday’s 3-0 Champions League defeat to Feyenoord wasn’t painful enough for Bayern Munich - it got even worse for the Bundesliga giants this morning as they licked their wounds. “Alphonso Davies suffered a sprain to his left hamstring during last night’s Champions League match against Feyenoord in Rotterdam,” a club statement read.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 28: Is Joshua Kimmich correct — is Bayern Munich not a “top” team? If so, what needs to change?; Should fans be worried about Harry Kane?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich got battered in Rotterdam by Feyenoord and it opened up a whole lot of discussion about what might be going on with Bayern Munich and why the squad has come up so small at times this season. Bayern Munich laid an egg in Rotterdam...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich “in contact” with Real Madrid
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich star midfielder Joshua Kimmich is “in contact” with Real Madrid over a potential move this summer. Kimmich sees Real Madrid as an “attractive destination” and the Spanish powerhouse is a “serious” contender to land the Germany international:

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'eyeing blockbuster move' for Bayern Munich superstar 'this summer'
arts.sum: Barcelona will allegedly attempt to sign Bayern Munich attacker Jamal Musiala during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich in talks with Real Madrid
arts.sum: As reported by Christian Falk, Joshua Kimmich is in talks with Real Madrid regarding a potential transfer. The Bayern Munich midfielder is free to talk to clubs this winter as…

arts.ttl: Tom Bischof: Bayern Munich's future playmaker and Joshua Kimmich heir
arts.sum: When Bayern won the sextuple in 2020 thanks to triumphs in the Bundesliga, DFB Cup, UEFA Champions League, DFL Supercup, UEFA Super Cup and the FIFA Club World Cup, it was Joshua Kimmich and Thiago Alcantara dictating play in the middle of the park - albeit with the latter departing after the initial three successes and therefore playing no part in the others. That puts him in the top 10 among Bundesliga central midfielders who have been closed down at least 100 times, although Kimmich is one of those ahead of him with a 76 percent success rate from 187 presses.

arts.ttl: Report: Olympique Marseille interested in Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Olympique Marseille have enquired about a potential loan move for Mathys Tel to replace Elye Wahi who is set to join Eintracht Frankfurt [@lequipe] Bayern Munich ’s Mathys Tel appears determined to stay and fight for his place in Vincent Kompany’s squad — but the young forward has no shortage of interested suitors should he choose to go out on loan.
